goal: Implement lib/secrets-store.cjs + OS-keychain wrappers. .gad/secrets/<projectid>.enc format from 60-01. Three keychain adapters: windows-credential-manager (via PowerShell or node-ffi), macos-keychain (security CLI), linux-secret-service (via dbus-next). Unit tests with a mock keychain adapter. .gad/ added to repo-level .gitignore across all projects that register a planning root.
